name: UniFi Network
description: Query IP addresses and MAC addresses across all sites on an on-premise UniFi Network controller. Supports block and reconnect actions for connected clients.

options.name: UniFi Controller URL
options.description: The base URL of your on-premise UniFi Network controller. Must NOT end with a trailing slash. Example: https://192.168.1.1/proxy/network/integration

options.name: API Key
options.description: Your UniFi Network controller API Key. Generate one from the controller UI under Settings → API.

options.name: Ignored Entities
options.description: Comma-separated list of IP addresses or MAC addresses to ignore during lookup.

options.name: IP Blocklist Regex
options.description: IP addresses matching this regex will not be looked up. Leave blank to query all IP addresses.
